name: cogno-anchor-relayer
description: cogno-chain M3 Tier-A Anchor Relayer — writes finalized post-state roots to Cardano as tx metadata and sudo-acks the checkpoint back on L3. Evidence, not enforcement (DR-20).
comment: Dependencies (polkadot-api, @meshsdk/core, @polkadot-labs/hdkd*, @polkadot-api/descriptors) are shared with the frontend via node_modules -> ../../app/node_modules (a symlink). The relayer reuses the M2d owner wallet helper at ../../app/scripts/m2d-wallet.mjs and the regenerated PAPI descriptors. No separate install needed; see README.md.
